path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\01. Title Theme - Kid Icarus.mp3
description: I quite like it. It doesn't go above or beyond but it's alright.
title: Title Theme - Kid Icarus
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\02. Kid Icarus Retro Medley.mp3
description: This one is unlistenable not because the music of Kid Icarus is bad, far from it, but rather because it starts with a horrendous screeching sound from the Title Theme. Horrific.
title: Kid Icarus Retro Medley
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\03. Underworld.mp3
description: This is genuinely great! And it's associated with lots of great memories from the beginning of Subspace Emissary.
title: Underworld
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\04. Overworld.mp3
description: Another great track with some fun flamenco vibes in there as well. I think these OG Kid Icarus remixes were great for introducing everyone to this game.
title: Overworld
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\05. Boss Fight 1 - Kid Icarus - Uprising.mp3
description: I get that's kinda good but it just doesn't awaken anything inside of me.
title: Boss Fight 1
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\06. Magnus's Theme.mp3
description: This is pretty boring. I don't even remember the character that much.
title: Magnus's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\07. Dark Pit.mp3
description: This is like a bizarre acoustic version of the Dark Pit theme that they used in Smash Run. It's alright.
title: Dark Pit
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\08. Dark Pit's Theme.mp3
description: This is the normal Dark Pit theme from Uprising. It's pretty good.
title: Dark Pit's Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\09. In the Space-Pirate Ship.mp3
description: Cute that the original composer remixed his own track to make it more smash-ified. The remix itself is pretty so-so if you ask me.
title: In the Space-Pirate Ship
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\10. Hades's Infernal Theme.mp3
description: I don't really like it. The timings seem weird and off-putting.
title: Hades's Infernal Theme
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\11. Wrath of the Reset Bomb.mp3
description: Cool that they made a stage from this level. I like the music from it. It's kinda hopeful considering what actually happens. The remix is a slightly more exciting version of it. Funny to think this is the guy who made Streets of Rage.
title: Wrath of the Reset Bomb
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\12. Wrath of the Reset Bomb.mp3
description: This is the original music which for some reason was used only in Smash Run. I prefer the remix. This track does take you places though.
title: Wrath of the Reset Bomb
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\13. Thunder Cloud Temple.mp3
description: I don't really like this one. It's inoffensive.
title: Thunder Cloud Temple
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\14. Lightning Chariot Base.mp3
description: The instruments sound pretty bad. Don't like the 5/8 bit.
title: Lightning Chariot Base
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 15 - Kid Icarus (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\15. Destroyed Skyworld.mp3
description: This song is popular but I don't really get why. I don't like the vocals.
title: Destroyed Skyworld
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 15: Kid Icarus
